title: osmanthus ilicifolius f. purpureus
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius f. purpureus is a variant of the Osmanthus ilicifolius plant, commonly known as the Chinese tea olive or osmanthus, which is a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to southern China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Osmanthus ilicifolius f. purpureus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health, among others. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried flower extract, and is also used in herbal preparations for its fragrant and medicinal properties.
